steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the number of Girl Scouts aged 11–14 in 1995. In the table, age 11–14 corresponds to the Cadettes row; the answer is the value at the intersection of Cadettes and 1995.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "172.": The value in the Cadettes row, 1995 column (in thousands). ✓
  • "174.": The Cadettes value from the 1994 column — wrong year. ✗
  • "807.": Does not appear in the table. ✗
  • "784.": The 1995 value from the Adults row — wrong age group. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
